mnemonics.title: Spark Components - CSSMG
mnemonics.content: C - Core (RDDs, foundation), S - SQL (structured data), S - Streaming (real-time micro-batches), M - MLlib (machine learning), G - GraphX (graph processing). Think: 'Core SQL Streams ML Graphs'.

mnemonics.title: RDD Properties - RDI
mnemonics.content: R - Resilient (fault-tolerant via lineage), D - Distributed (partitioned across cluster), I - Immutable (cannot be changed). Think: 'RDI - Resilient Distributed Immutable'.

mnemonics.title: Lazy vs Eager - TA
mnemonics.content: T - Transformations are lazy (map, filter build DAG, no execution), A - Actions are eager (count, collect trigger computation). Think: 'Transform later, Act now'.

mnemonics.title: Spark Architecture - DCE
mnemonics.content: D - Driver (control program, creates SparkContext), C - Cluster Manager (allocates resources: YARN/Mesos), E - Executors (run tasks on workers, cache data). Think: 'Driver Commands Executors'.
